controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction
controls.control_description:
Chapter-I Preliminary
Note: Mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in the Directions does not
imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to the extant statutory and
regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an
activity or transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day these are placed on the
official website of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative
Banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure in respect of all business transacted by it prepare a balance sheet and profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year or the period
controls.control_description:
In terms of the provisions of Section 29 read with Section 56 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 (BR Act, 1949), a bank shall in respect of all business
transacted by it prepare a Balance Sheet and Profit and Loss Account as on
the last working day of the year or the period, as the case may be, in the Forms
set out in the Third Schedule of the BR Act, 1949 as substituted by clause (zl)
of Section 56 of the said Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in respect of all business transacted by it prepare a balance sheet and profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year or the period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the announcements of the institute of chartered accountants of india (icai) regarding applicability of accounting standards
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the announcements of the Institute of Chartered
Accountants of India (ICAI) regarding applicability of Accounting Standards,
subject to Directions / Guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the announcements of the institute of chartered accountants of india (icai) regarding applicability of accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure to comply with all the accounting standards
controls.control_description:
Level-I enterprises are required to comply with all the
accounting standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to comply with all the accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the following with respect to relevant issues in the application of certain accounting standards for the bank
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also be guided by the following with respect to relevant issues in
the application of certain Accounting Standards for the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the following with respect to relevant issues in the application of certain accounting standards for the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt its own methods, on a reasonable and consistent basis, for allocation of expenditure among the segments
controls.control_description:
b) A bank shall adopt its own methods, on a reasonable and consistent basis, for allocation of
expenditure among the segments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt its own methods, on a reasonable and consistent basis, for allocation of expenditure among the segments

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the entire investment portfolio
controls.control_description: c) 'Treasury' shall include the entire investment portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the entire investment portfolio

controls.control_objective: To ensure include exposures which fulfil the four criteria of orientation, product, granularity, and low value of individual exposures for retail exposures laid
controls.control_description:
d) Retail Banking shall include exposures which fulfil the four criteria of orientation, product,
granularity, and low value of individual exposures for retail exposures laid down in the Reserve Bank
of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include exposures which fulfil the four criteria of orientation, product, granularity, and low value of individual exposures for retail exposures laid

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include all other residual operations such as para banking transactions / activities
controls.control_description:
It shall also include all other residual operations
such as para banking transactions / activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include all other residual operations such as para banking transactions / activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure report additional segments within 'other banking business' which meet the quantitative criterion prescribed in the as 17 for identifying reportable se
controls.control_description:
g) Besides the above-mentioned segments, a bank shall report additional segments within 'Other
Banking Business' which meet the quantitative criterion prescribed in the AS 17 for identifying
reportable segments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report additional segments within 'other banking business' which meet the quantitative criterion prescribed in the as 17 for identifying reportable se

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed, irrespective of whether there have been transactions
controls.control_description:
ii) The name and nature of related party relationship shall be disclosed, irrespective of whether
there have been transactions, where control exists within the meaning of the Standard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed, irrespective of whether there have been transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to aggregate for each of the above related party categories and would pertain to the year-end position as also the maximum position during
controls.control_description:
The disclosures may be limited to
aggregate for each of the above related party categories and would pertain to the year-end
position as also the maximum position during the year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to aggregate for each of the above related party categories and would pertain to the year-end position as also the maximum position during

controls.control_objective: To ensure be if the income is reckoned net of costs
controls.control_description:
Since materiality is not objectively
defined, it has been decided that all a bank should ensure compliance
with the provisions of the Accounting Standard in respect of any item of
prior period income or prior period expenditure which exceeds one
percent of the total income / total expenditure of the bank if the income /
expenditure is reckoned on a gross basis or one percent of the net profit
before taxes or net losses as the case may be if the income is reckoned
net of costs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be if the income is reckoned net of costs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in the 'notes on accounts' to the balance sheet of a bank
controls.control_description:
(iv) Since the format of the profit and loss accounts of a bank prescribed in
Form B under Third Schedule to the BR Act, 1949, does not specifically
provide for disclosure of the impact of prior period items on the current
year's profit and loss, such disclosures, wherever warranted, may be
made in the 'Notes on Accounts' to the balance sheet of a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in the 'notes on accounts' to the balance sheet of a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract a qualification by the statutory auditors as this would be in conformity with provisions of the standard, as it recognises postponement of rec
controls.control_description:
(i) Non-recognition of income by the bank in case of non-performing
advances and non-performing investments, in compliance with the
regulatory prescriptions of the Reserve Bank of India, shall not attract a
qualification by the statutory auditors as this would be in conformity with
provisions of the standard, as it recognises postponement of recognition
of revenue where collectability of the revenue is significantly uncertain.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract a qualification by the statutory auditors as this would be in conformity with provisions of the standard, as it recognises postponement of rec

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the following while complying with the provisions of the standard
controls.control_description:
The issues that arise in this context have been identified and a bank shall
be guided by the following while complying with the provisions of the standard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the following while complying with the provisions of the standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded on initial recognition in the reporting currency, by applying to the foreign currency amount the exchange rate between the reporting curre
controls.control_description:
(a) As per paragraphs 9 and 21 of the Standard, a foreign currency
transaction shall be recorded on initial recognition in the reporting
currency, by applying to the foreign currency amount the exchange rate
between the reporting currency and the foreign currency at the date of the
transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded on initial recognition in the reporting currency, by applying to the foreign currency amount the exchange rate between the reporting curre

controls.control_objective: To ensure face difficulty in applying the exchange rate prevailing at the date of the transaction in respect of the items which are not being recorded in indian
controls.control_description:
A bank may face difficulty in applying the exchange rate
prevailing at the date of the transaction in respect of the items which are
not being recorded in Indian Rupees or are currently being recorded using
a notional exchange rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to face difficulty in applying the exchange rate prevailing at the date of the transaction in respect of the items which are not being recorded in indian

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the requirements
controls.control_description:
(b) A bank, which is in a position to apply the exchange rate prevailing on
the date of the transaction for recording the foreign currency transactions
as required under AS 11 shall comply with the requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the following:
controls.control_description:
A bank,
which has an extensive branch network, have a high volume of foreign
currency transactions and is not fully equipped on the technology front
shall be guided by the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure to record the transactions at the date of the occurrence thereof, the weekly average closing rate of the preceding week can be used for recording the transactions occurring in the relevant week
controls.control_description:
Since
the enterprises are required to record the transactions at the date of
the occurrence thereof, the weekly average closing rate of the
preceding week can be used for recording the transactions occurring
in the relevant week, if the same approximates the actual rate at the
date of the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to record the transactions at the date of the occurrence thereof, the weekly average closing rate of the preceding week can be used for recording the transactions occurring in the relevant week

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in applying the exchange rates at the dates of the transactions and since the standard allows the use of a rate that approximates the actual rate
controls.control_description:
In view of the practical difficulties which a
bank may have in applying the exchange rates at the dates of the
transactions and since the Standard allows the use of a rate that
approximates the actual rate at the date of the transaction, the bank
may use average rates as detailed below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in applying the exchange rates at the dates of the transactions and since the standard allows the use of a rate that approximates the actual rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure now be <image> recorded at the date of the transaction by using the weekly average closing rate of the preceding week, published by fedai
controls.control_description:
(iii) In respect of those foreign currency transactions, which are currently
not being recorded in Indian Rupees at the date of the transaction or
are being recorded using a notional exchange rate shall now be
<image>
recorded at the date of the transaction by using the weekly average
closing rate of the preceding week, published by FEDAI, if the same
approximates the actual rate at the date of the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to now be <image> recorded at the date of the transaction by using the weekly average closing rate of the preceding week, published by fedai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used
controls.control_description:
(iv) If the weekly average closing rate of the preceding week does not
approximate the actual rate at the date of the transaction, the closing
rate at the date of the transaction shall be used.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed in the 'notes to accounts' to the financial statements
controls.control_description:
The items listed in these Directions shall be disclosed in the 'Notes to Accounts'
to the financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed in the 'notes to accounts' to the financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional disclosures where material
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make additional disclosures where
material.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional disclosures where material

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed as separate
controls.control_description:
In addition to the Schedules to the balance sheet, a summary of 'significant
accounting policies', and 'Notes to Accounts' shall be disclosed as separate
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed as separate

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the minimum, furnish the following information in the 'notes to accounts'
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, at the minimum, furnish the following information in the 'Notes to
Accounts'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , at the minimum, furnish the following information in the 'notes to accounts'

controls.control_objective: To ensure note that mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in the disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to
controls.control_description:
The bank shall note that mere mention of an activity, transaction or
item in the disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted, and the bank
shall refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining
the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to note that mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in the disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose comparative information in respect of the previous period for all amounts reported in the current period's financial statements
controls.control_description:
The bank shall
disclose comparative information in respect of the previous period for all
amounts reported in the current period's financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose comparative information in respect of the previous period for all amounts reported in the current period's financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information if it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank
shall include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information if
it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include comparative information for narrative and descriptive information if it is relevant to understanding the current period's financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
<image>
(1) Regulatory capital
Note: A bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Asset
Liability Management) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose as under current year previous year amount of non-equity tier 1 capital raised during the year of which: ### ### a) perpetual non-cumulative
controls.control_description:
* Example: A bank may disclose as under
Current year Previous year
Amount of non-equity Tier 1 capital raised during the year of which:
### ###
a) Perpetual Non-Cumulative Preference Shares b) Perpetual Debt Instruments
### ###
### ###
**Example: A bank may disclose as under:
Current year Previous year Amount of Tier 2 capital raised during the year of which:
### ### a) Perpetual Cumulative Preference Shares b) Long term subordinated debt instruments c)…..
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose as under current year previous year amount of non-equity tier 1 capital raised during the year of which: ### ### a) perpetual non-cumulative

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made regarding any draw down from reserves
controls.control_description:
(ii) Draw down from Reserves
Suitable disclosures mentioning the amount and the rationale for withdrawal
shall be made regarding any draw down from reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made regarding any draw down from reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure match the total of non-slr investments held by the bank
controls.control_description: For a bank the total shall match the total of non-SLR investments held by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to match the total of non-slr investments held by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mutually exclusive
controls.control_description: Amounts reported under columns 4, 5, 6 and 7 above may not be mutually exclusive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mutually exclusive

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as specified in the reserve bank of india (government securities lending) directions, 2023, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Note:
Note - The disclosure shall be as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Government Securities
Lending) Directions, 2023, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as specified in the reserve bank of india (government securities lending) directions, 2023, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison
controls.control_description:
Note:
1) While making disclosures in audited annual financial statements, a bank should invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison

controls.control_objective: To ensure be certified by statutory auditors
controls.control_description: Amount of Technical write-off should be certified by statutory auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be certified by statutory auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be netted off from gross npas to arrive at net npas
controls.control_description: 3) To the extent that floating provisions have not been reckoned for Tier 2 capital, they may be netted off from Gross NPAs to arrive at Net NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be netted off from gross npas to arrive at net npas

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit this disclosure
controls.control_description:
Note: If a bank does not have any overseas assets, NPAs and revenues, in both the current
and previous year it may omit this disclosure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to omit this disclosure

controls.control_objective: To ensure add back (i) tax expense, and (ii) provisions for standard and non-performing assets (recognised as expenses in its profit and loss account) to its re
controls.control_description:
Note: To determine this threshold, a bank shall add back (i) tax
expense, and (ii) provisions for standard and non-performing
assets (recognised as expenses in its Profit and Loss Account) to
its reported net profits for the year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to add back (i) tax expense, and (ii) provisions for standard and non-performing assets (recognised as expenses in its profit and loss account) to its re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reduced progressively in a phased manner, after review
controls.control_description:
Note: This threshold may be reduced progressively in a phased
manner, after review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reduced progressively in a phased manner, after review

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison
controls.control_description:
Adjusted (notional) Net Profit after Tax (PAT) for the year ended March 31, 20XX after considering the divergence in provisioning
Note: While making disclosures in audited annual financial statements, a bank
should invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to
facilitate comparison.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably provide the figures for both the current and previous year to facilitate comparison

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Note: As regards NFB credit limits, the bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank
of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force from april 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date")
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into force from April 1,
2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy
("effective date").
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to come into force from april 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date")

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed in terms of these directions
controls.control_description:
Extension of any new NFB facility and renewal of an existing
NFB facility after the effective date, shall be governed in terms of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed in terms of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the existing instructions as applicable to the respective bank
controls.control_description:
All existing NFB facilities extended/ renewed till the effective date shall be
governed by the existing instructions as applicable to the respective bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the existing instructions as applicable to the respective bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
The bank shall be
guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - resolution of stressed assets) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure make the disclosures for the full year in the annual financial statements
controls.control_description:
Note: A bank that is not required by the listing requirements or otherwise to
publish quarterly / half-yearly statements, shall make the disclosures for the full
year in the annual financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make the disclosures for the full year in the annual financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit those line items which are not applicable/ permitted or have nil exposure both in current and previous year
controls.control_description:
Note: A bank may omit those line items which are not applicable/ permitted or have nil
exposure both in current and previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to omit those line items which are not applicable/ permitted or have nil exposure both in current and previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit disclosure of the table while mentioning that it has no exposure to country risk
controls.control_description:
Note - If a bank has no exposure to country risk in both the current and previous year, it may
omit disclosure of the table while mentioning that it has no exposure to country risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to omit disclosure of the table while mentioning that it has no exposure to country risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, has been invoked due to change in scope and size of the project
controls.control_description: 6 Out of '5', accounts in respect of which resolution process involving extension in original/extended DCCO, as the case may be, has been invoked due to change in scope and size of the project.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, has been invoked due to change in scope and size of the project

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, was funded
controls.control_description: 7 Out of '5', account in respect of which cost overrun associated with extension in original/extended DCCO, as the case may be, was funded
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, was funded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, has been invoked
controls.control_description:
7.2 Out of '7', accounts where SBCF was not pre- sanctioned or renewed continuously
8 Out of '4' - accounts in respect of which resolution process not involving extension in original/extended DCCO, as the case may be, has been invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, has been invoked

controls.control_objective: To ensure omit these disclosures and instead disclose that it has not entered into any transactions in derivatives in the current and previous years
controls.control_description:
Closing balance at the end of FY [(k) + (l)]
Note:
Note: A bank that has not entered into any derivative transactions, both in the
current and previous year may omit these disclosures and instead disclose that
it has not entered into any transactions in derivatives in the current and
previous years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to omit these disclosures and instead disclose that it has not entered into any transactions in derivatives in the current and previous years

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be disclosed
controls.control_description:
Note: Nature and terms of the swaps including information on credit and market risk and the
accounting policies adopted for recording the swaps shall also be disclosed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be disclosed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed based on credit exposure i
controls.control_description:
(ii) Concentration of advances*
(Amount in ₹ crore) Particulars Current Year Previous Year Total advances to the twenty largest borrowers


Percentage of advances to twenty largest borrowers to total advances of the bank
*Advances shall be computed based on credit exposure i.e., funded and non-funded limits
including derivative exposures where applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed based on credit exposure i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned
controls.control_description:
The sanctioned limits or outstanding,
whichever are higher, shall be reckoned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding as the credit exposure
controls.control_description:
However, in the case of fully drawn term loans, where
there is no scope for redrawal of any portion of the sanctioned limit, a bank may reckon the
outstanding as the credit exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the outstanding as the credit exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed as per applicable rbi regulation
controls.control_description:
(iii) Concentration of exposures**
(Amount in ₹ crore) Particulars Current Year Previous Year
Total exposure to the twenty largest borrowers / customers
Percentage of exposures to the twenty largest borrowers / customers to the total exposure of the bank on borrowers / customers
**Exposures shall be computed as per applicable RBI regulation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed as per applicable rbi regulation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown either under asset or liability, as the case may be, for each type of derivatives
controls.control_description:
The net position shall be shown either under asset or liability, as the case may be, for
each type of derivatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown either under asset or liability, as the case may be, for each type of derivatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the current exposure method on measurement of credit exposure of derivative products as per extant reserve bank of india instructions
controls.control_description:
A bank may adopt the Current Exposure Method on Measurement of Credit Exposure of
Derivative Products as per extant Reserve Bank of India instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the current exposure method on measurement of credit exposure of derivative products as per extant reserve bank of india instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify here that the closing balance of the amount transferred to dea fund, as disclosed above, are also included under 'schedule 12 - contingent lia
controls.control_description:
Particulars Current Year Previous Year
i) Opening balance of amounts transferred to DEA Fund
ii) Add: Amounts transferred to DEA Fund during the year
iii) Less: Amounts reimbursed by DEA Fund towards claims
iv) Closing balance of amounts transferred to DEA Fund
A bank shall specify here that the closing balance of the amount transferred to DEA Fund, as disclosed above, are also included under 'Schedule 12 - Contingent Liabilities - Other items for which the bank is contingently liable' or 'Contingent Liabilities - Others,' as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify here that the closing balance of the amount transferred to dea fund, as disclosed above, are also included under 'schedule 12 - contingent lia

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed in the 'notes to accounts' to the balance sheet in the concerned bank's next annual report
controls.control_description:
(i) Penalties imposed by the Reserve Bank of India under the
provisions of the (a) BR Act, 1949, (b) Payment and Settlement
Systems Act, 2007, and (c) Government Securities Act, 2006 (for
bouncing of SGL) shall be disclosed in the 'Notes to Accounts' to the
balance sheet in the concerned bank's next Annual Report.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be disclosed in the 'notes to accounts' to the balance sheet in the concerned bank's next annual report

controls.control_objective: To ensure make appropriate disclosures on the nature of the breach, number of instances of default and the quantum of penalty imposed
controls.control_description:
(ii) A bank shall make appropriate disclosures on the nature of the
breach, number of instances of default and the quantum of penalty
imposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate disclosures on the nature of the breach, number of instances of default and the quantum of penalty imposed

controls.control_objective: To ensure make appropriate disclosure on the number of instances of default as well as the quantum of penalty paid to the reserve bank of india during the finan
controls.control_description:
(iii) The defaulting participant in a reverse repo transaction shall make
appropriate disclosure on the number of instances of default as well
as the quantum of penalty paid to the Reserve Bank of India during
the financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate disclosure on the number of instances of default as well as the quantum of penalty paid to the reserve bank of india during the finan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded
controls.control_description:
4For the purpose of computation of business per employee (deposits plus advances), inter-
bank deposits shall be excluded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed for both the current year and previous year
controls.control_description:
(ii) Bancassurance business
The details of fees / brokerage earned in respect of insurance broking,
agency and bancassurance business undertaken by a bank shall be
disclosed for both the current year and previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed for both the current year and previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the details of fees / remuneration received in respect of the marketing and distribution function (excluding bancassurance business) undertak
controls.control_description:
(iii) Marketing and distribution
A bank shall disclose the details of fees / remuneration received in
respect of the marketing and distribution function (excluding
bancassurance business) undertaken by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the details of fees / remuneration received in respect of the marketing and distribution function (excluding bancassurance business) undertak

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed
controls.control_description:
(iv) Disclosures regarding Priority Sector Lending Certificates
(PSLCs)
The amount of PSLCs (category-wise) sold and purchased during the
year shall be disclosed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose in the annual report that 'deposit insurance premium as applicable was paid to dicgc within the prescribed timelines'
controls.control_description:
(vi) Payment of DICGC Insurance Premium
2[A bank shall disclose in the annual report that 'deposit insurance premium as applicable was paid to DICGC within the prescribed timelines'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose in the annual report that 'deposit insurance premium as applicable was paid to dicgc within the prescribed timelines'

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be disclosed
controls.control_description: In case the bank has not paid as per the required timelines, the same shall also be disclosed.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be disclosed

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose any fund or non-fund (guarantees, letters of credit, etc
controls.control_description:
(vii) Disclosure of facilities granted to directors and their relatives
A bank shall disclose any fund or non-fund (guarantees, letters of credit, etc.)
facilities extended to directors, their relatives, companies or firms in which they
are interested.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose any fund or non-fund (guarantees, letters of credit, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch account entries
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch
account entries.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch account entries

controls.control_objective: To ensure segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five years in the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'blocked account' which
controls.control_description:
(1) The bank shall segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five
years in the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate
'Blocked Account' which shall be shown under 'Other Liabilities-
Suspense'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five years in the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'blocked account' which

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted only with the authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the controlling / head office if the amount exceeds ₹ one lakh
controls.control_description:
(2) Any adjustment from the Blocked Account should be permitted only with
the authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the
Controlling / Head Office if the amount exceeds ₹ One lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted only with the authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the controlling / head office if the amount exceeds ₹ one lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as a liability for the purpose of the maintenance of cash reserve ratio (crr) and statutory liquidity ratio (slr)
controls.control_description:
(3) The balance in Blocked Account shall be reckoned as a liability for the
purpose of the maintenance of Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) and Statutory
Liquidity Ratio (SLR).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as a liability for the purpose of the maintenance of cash reserve ratio (crr) and statutory liquidity ratio (slr)

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various types of transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done categ
controls.control_description:
(4) The bank shall maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various
types of transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the
netting can be done category-wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various types of transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done categ

controls.control_objective: To ensure segregate the debit and credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at the net position category-wise, while also consid
controls.control_description:
As on the balance sheet date, the
bank shall segregate the debit and credit entries remaining unreconciled
for more than six months and arrive at the net position category-wise,
while also considering the balance in the Blocked Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to segregate the debit and credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at the net position category-wise, while also consid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be aggregated and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made
controls.control_description:
(5) The net debit under all the categories of inter-branch accounts shall be
aggregated and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate
net debit shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be aggregated and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the net debit in one category is not set-off against net credit in another category
controls.control_description:
Provided that the bank shall ensure that the net debit in one category is
not set-off against net credit in another category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the net debit in one category is not set-off against net credit in another category

controls.control_objective: To ensure of a bank shall be as under
controls.control_description:
Treatment of outstanding entries in Nostro accounts shall of a bank shall
be as under.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of a bank shall be as under

controls.control_objective: To ensure take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation of differences
controls.control_description:
(1) The bank shall take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and
put in place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for
immediate escalation of differences, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation of differences

controls.control_objective: To ensure be close monitoring of pending items in nostro accounts by top management at short intervals
controls.control_description:
(2) There shall be close monitoring of pending items in Nostro accounts by
top management at short intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be close monitoring of pending items in nostro accounts by top management at short intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to a blocked account and shown as outstanding liabilities
controls.control_description:
(3) All unreconciled credit entries in Nostro accounts which are outstanding
for more than three years shall be transferred to a Blocked Account and
shown as outstanding liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to a blocked account and shown as outstanding liabilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose of crr / slr
controls.control_description:
(4) The balance in the Blocked Account shall be reckoned for the purpose of
CRR / SLR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose of crr / slr

controls.control_objective: To ensure make 100 percent provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries in the nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years
controls.control_description:
(5) A bank shall make 100 percent provision in respect of all unreconciled
debit entries in the Nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than
two years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make 100 percent provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries in the nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure to transfer, out of the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to
controls.control_description:
In terms of Sections 17(1) read with Section 56 of the BR Act, 1949 a
bank is required to transfer, out of the balance of profit as disclosed in the
profit and loss account, a sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of
such profit to Reserve Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to transfer, out of the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to

controls.control_objective: To ensure take prior approval from the reserve bank of india before any appropriation is made from the statutory reserve or any other reserve
controls.control_description:
Unless specifically allowed by extant regulations, the bank shall take prior
approval from the Reserve Bank of India before any appropriation is
made from the Statutory Reserve or any other reserve.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take prior approval from the reserve bank of india before any appropriation is made from the statutory reserve or any other reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reflected in the profit and loss <image> account for the period as an 'above the line' item (i
controls.control_description:
Bank is further advised that
(1) all expenses including provisions and write-offs recognised in a period,
whether mandatory or prudential, shall be reflected in the profit and loss
<image>
account for the period as an 'above the line' item (i.e., before arriving at
the net profit / loss for the year);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reflected in the profit and loss <image> account for the period as an 'above the line' item (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected only 'below the line' (i
controls.control_description:
(2) draw down from reserves, with the prior approval of Reserve Bank of
India, shall be effected only 'below the line' (i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected only 'below the line' (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made of such draw down in the 'notes on accounts' to the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
and
(3) suitable disclosures shall be made of such draw down in the 'Notes on
Accounts' to the Balance Sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made of such draw down in the 'notes on accounts' to the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure be utilised for writing off the expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments
controls.control_description:
Provided that the share premium account shall not be utilised for writing
off the expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be utilised for writing off the expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure include registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purposes of this Direction, issue expenses shall
include registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal,
accounting, and other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp
duties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to make the provision for the same over a period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the fraud has been
controls.control_description:
In respect of provisioning for frauds, a bank that has reported the fraud
within the prescribed time shall have the option to make the provision for
the same over a period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from
the quarter in which the fraud has been detected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to make the provision for the same over a period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the fraud has been

controls.control_objective: To ensure debit reserves other than the statutory reserve by the amount remaining un- provided at the end of the financial year by credit to provisions
controls.control_description:
Where the bank chooses to provide for the fraud over two to four quarters
and this results in the full provisioning being made in more than one
financial year, subject to compliance with applicable laws, it may debit
reserves other than the Statutory Reserve by the amount remaining un-
provided at the end of the financial year by credit to provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to debit reserves other than the statutory reserve by the amount remaining un- provided at the end of the financial year by credit to provisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure it should subsequently proportionately reverse the debits to the reserves and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the su
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that it should subsequently proportionately reverse the debits to
the reserves and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss
account, in the successive quarters of the next financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to it should subsequently proportionately reverse the debits to the reserves and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the su

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be made at once
controls.control_description:
Where there has been delay, beyond the prescribed period, in reporting
the fraud to the Reserve Bank, the entire provisioning is required to be
made at once.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be made at once

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the profit and loss account or to any reserves
controls.control_description:
Unreconciled credit balances in any transitory account representing
unclaimed balances shall not be transferred to the profit and loss account
or to any reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the profit and loss account or to any reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure make provisions for dtl on the special reserve created under section 36(1)(viii) of income tax act, 1961
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make provisions for DTL on the Special Reserve created
under Section 36(1)(viii) of Income Tax Act, 1961.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make provisions for dtl on the special reserve created under section 36(1)(viii) of income tax act, 1961

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown against item 3 of profit and loss account, i
controls.control_description:
All expenses on the conduct of Board meetings shall be shown against
item 3 of Profit and Loss Account, i.e., 'Directors and Local Committee
Members-Fees and Allowances".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown against item 3 of profit and loss account, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account reflects true and fair picture of its financial position
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account
reflects true and fair picture of its financial position.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account reflects true and fair picture of its financial position

controls.control_objective: To ensure be viewed seriously and appropriate penal action in terms of the provisions of the br act, 1949, shall be considered
controls.control_description:
Instances of window dressing of financials, short provisioning,
misclassification of NPAs, under-reporting / incorrect computation of
exposure / risk weight, incorrect capitalisation of expenses, capitalisation
of interest on NPAs, deliberate inflation of asset and liabilities at the end
of the financial year and subsequent reversal immediately in next financial
<image>
year, etc., shall be viewed seriously and appropriate penal action in terms
of the provisions of the BR Act, 1949, shall be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be viewed seriously and appropriate penal action in terms of the provisions of the br act, 1949, shall be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines
repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or
guidelines shall continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All
approvals or acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall
be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these
directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal
proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed
as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in
derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or
directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or
guidelines shall continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
